name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, it feels soft and luxurious!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing and retro briefcase shape.
The large size looks cool and is perfect for shoulder carry.
Magnetic closure inside with a large capacity!
Three carrying styles: Handbag, Shoulder, and Crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a natural, French "laid-back" vibe!
Large model number 89353
Dimensions 34.5*27*14 (gift bag included)
